Universal Tool Chasing Hammer Dual Face Smooth Flat Side Rounded Side 10 Inch

Take control of your metalworking and jewelry projects with the Universal Tool 10" Heavy Duty Chasing Hammer. Designed for precision and durability, this dual-face hammer features a polished flat striking surface and a rounded end ideal for riveting, shaping, and texturing metal.

Key Features

  • DUAL FACE DESIGN - Flat 1-1/8" striking surface for shaping and a 15mm rounded end perfect for riveting and detail work
  • MIRROR POLISHED FINISH - Smooth, shiny head reduces marring and delivers clean, professional results
  • PRECISION & CONTROL - Lightweight 6 oz. head offers excellent balance for fine metalworking tasks
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Built for repeated use with a solid steel head and sturdy wood handle
  • VERSATILE USE - Ideal for jewelry making, metal shaping, chasing, riveting, and craft applications

Product Specifications

  • MPN: THDH-SSRS
  • UPC: 060886644019
  • Color: Brown
  • Size: 10 in

The solid wood handle provides a comfortable grip and balanced control, making it a reliable tool for jewelers, metalsmiths, and hobbyists alike.
